audit_items.proof_trace: OZ SafeERC20.safeTransferFrom (L453) reverts on failure (insufficient balance or allowance), and there is no try/catch in bid(). EVM atomicity guarantees that all prior state changes in the transaction — including the safeTransfer of asset to msg.sender (L444) and any auctionCallback side effects (L449) — are fully rolled back. The custom reentrancy flag s_entered also reverts to false, preventing lock-up.
